title: Super Mario Bros in First Person
description:
This is what happens when you combine Super Mario and Half-life 2. Map made by me.

If you wanna see what's inside the pipe, check out this video.
http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5izByqf8gb0

Download the map here:
http://twhl.co.za/mapvault_map.php?id=4214

If you're wondering,
NO, I DID NOT USE GMOD. I did it in Half-Life 2.
